case_title: SIDNEY S. SILBERBERG VS. SAIED AMIN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SILBERBERG, SIDNEY S. AS TO DEFENDANT AMIN, SAIED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY SILBERBERG, SIDNEY S. AMIN, SAIED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-27-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2011 BY DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-30-2012 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. IF NO, APPEARANCES, CASE WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-27-2012 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS ASKING TO MODIFY THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AS THE DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO AY THE REMAINING $600.00 PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT PLUS $200.00 COURT COSTS, BALANCE OWING UNDER THE AGREEMENT = $800.00. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $100.00) SERVED OCT-14-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AMIN, SAIED
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED DELIVERED SENT TO SAIED AMIN DATED OCTOBER 18, 2011.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. "ACCORDING TO THE PROGRESS REPORT OF 11/14/11, IF NO APPEARANCES CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE". NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SILBERBERG, SIDNEY S. AS TO DEFENDANT AMIN, SAIED
